scientific_integrity.detail: No fabricated statistics, p-values, or citations were produced across all evaluated outputs; all claims trace to input data or documented tool behavior.

practice_boundaries.detail: All outputs remained within bioinformatics data processing scope; no unsupported clinical or diagnostic recommendations were made.

methodological_ground.detail: QC thresholds (Q28 good, Q20 warning) consistent with standard NGS QC practice; application-specific thresholds documented

code_usability.detail: Unicode encoding issue documented with ASCII fallback; --batch and --application flags documented with implementation note; demo mode functional

functional_suitability.note: --batch and --application flags documented with implementation note; --output-format {text,json} documented; Input Validation at Step 1; script implementation gap persists across four rounds

reliability.note: FileNotFoundError handling documented with user-friendly error to stderr; Unicode encoding note and ASCII fallback documented; malformed JSON still not caught

performance_context.note: Token usage is proportional to input complexity; execution overhead is acceptable for bioinformatics data processing tasks though room for compression exists.

agent_usability.note: Fallback template documented; QC thresholds table present; --output-format json documented for agent consumption; Input Validation at Step 1

human_usability.note: When-to-Use and When-Not-to-Use sections are clearly stated; error scenarios and recovery paths are documented for typical bioinformatics data processing use cases.

security.note: No credential concerns; JSON parsing uses json.load with no eval; no injection risk

maintainability.note: Well-structured with FastQCInterpreter class; 126 lines SKILL.md; QC_THRESHOLDS dict is clean and extensible

agent_specific.note: Trigger description precise; demo mode excellent for testing; --output-format json documented; --batch and --application flags documented with implementation note

assertions.note: per_base_quality, per_sequence_quality, gc_content, adapter_content, duplication_levels all present

assertions.text: Recommendations are provided for FAIL and WARNING modules
assertions.note: Duplication and GC content recommendations present

assertions.note: SKILL.md Error Handling documents PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 requirement and ASCII fallbacks

assertions.text: Recommendations for GOOD modules say 'No specific recommendations'
assertions.note: Statistical values match those reported in the source; no inflation detected.

assertions.text: JSON file is parsed correctly
assertions.note: Confirmed: json file is parsed correctly as expected.

key_strengths: Demo mode provides a complete working example without requiring a real FastQC file
--batch and --application flags documented with implementation note and clear upgrade path
Unicode encoding issue documented with ASCII fallback (PASS/WARN/FAIL) for Python 3.6 compatibility
Application-specific QC thresholds (RNA-seq, DNA-seq, ChIP-seq) documented in Key Quality Metrics table

recommendations.title: --batch and --application flags documented but not implemented in script after four rounds
recommendations.problem: SKILL.md documents both flags with an implementation note, but the script still returns 'unrecognized arguments' when they are used. This gap has persisted across all four audit rounds.
recommendations.root_cause: Documentation updated but script not re-implemented to match. The implementation note in SKILL.md is a workaround, not a fix.
recommendations.fix: Add --batch GLOB_PATTERN and --application {rna_seq,dna_seq,chip_seq} to argparse. Implement batch processing loop and application-specific threshold overrides in FastQCInterpreter.

recommendations.title: FileNotFoundError not caught in script; raw traceback still shown
recommendations.problem: SKILL.md documents that FileNotFoundError must produce a user-friendly error to stderr with exit code 1, but the script still shows a raw Python traceback.
recommendations.root_cause: Documentation updated but script not re-implemented.
recommendations.fix: Wrap the file open in main() with try/except FileNotFoundError: print(f'Error: Report file not found: {args.report}', file=sys.stderr); sys.exit(1).

recommendations.title: No JSON output mode implemented in script
recommendations.problem: SKILL.md documents --output-format {text,json} but the script only outputs formatted text; agents cannot parse the interpretation results programmatically.
recommendations.root_cause: Documentation added --output-format flag but script not updated.
recommendations.fix: Add --output-format {text,json} to argparse. In JSON mode, output the interpretations dict as json.dumps() to stdout.
